heading: Prison rape prevention and prosecution
label: 30304 Prison rape prevention and prosecution
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15604 of Title 42

children.heading: National clearinghouse
children.label: 1 National clearinghouse
children.text: There is established within the National Institute of Corrections a national clearinghouse for the provision of information and assistance to Federal, State, and local authorities responsible for the prevention, investigation, and punishment of instances of prison rape.

children.heading: Training and education
children.label: 2 Training and education
children.text: The National Institute of Corrections shall conduct periodic training and education programs for Federal, State, and local authorities responsible for the prevention, investigation, and punishment of instances of prison rape.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than September 30 of each year, the National Institute of Corrections shall submit a report to Congress and the Secretary of Health and Human Services. This report shall be available to the Director of the Bureau of Justice Statistics.

children.heading: Contents
children.label: 2 Contents
children.text: The report required under paragraph (1) shall summarize the activities of the Department of Justice regarding prison rape abatement for the preceding calendar year.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2004 through 2010 to carry out this section.
